user_description: Creating atomic adjust_votes RPC function in Supabase

arguments.name: add_adjust_votes_rpc
arguments.query:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION adjust_votes(p_logo_id INTEGER, p_up_delta INTEGER, p_down_delta INTEGER)
RETURNS void
LANGUAGE plpgsql
SECURITY DEFINER
AS $$
BEGIN
  UPDATE castle_votes
  SET
    up_votes   = GREATEST(0, up_votes   + p_up_delta),
    down_votes = GREATEST(0, down_votes + p_down_delta),
    updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE logo_id = p_logo_id;
END;
$$;

GRANT EXECUTE ON FUNCTION adjust_votes(INTEGER, INTEGER, INTEGER) TO anon, authenticated;
